products.name: Classic Cola
products.shortDescription: A bright and familiar cola with a crisp finish.
products.description: Classic Cola carries the confidence of a timeless drink, balanced with clean sweetness and a crisp, refreshing finish. This SKU is designed for everyday moments where a familiar taste is exactly what the occasion calls for.

products.name: Diet Cola
products.shortDescription: A lighter cola profile with a clean finish.
products.description: Diet Cola offers a layered taste structure with a lighter profile that suits modern lifestyles. Its body is easy to enjoy while maintaining the sense of familiarity that cola drinkers expect.

products.name: Lemon Lime
products.shortDescription: A citrus-led beverage with bright freshness.
products.description: Lemon Lime brings a lively citrus character to the table, offering a bright and refreshing profile that feels comfortable in both casual and formal settings.

products.name: Orange Soda
products.shortDescription: Sweet citrus brightness with smooth finish.
products.description: Orange Soda balances fruit character and soft sparkle, giving the beverage a smooth, welcoming profile that is easy to pair with everyday meals or quick breaks.

products.name: Grape Soda
products.shortDescription: A fruit-forward soda with polished sweetness.
products.description: Grape Soda presents a softly rounded fruit note and a well-structured finish, making it a confident choice for those who want a more expressive flavor profile.

products.name: Ice Tea Lemon
products.shortDescription: A botanical iced tea with a bright citrus lift.
products.description: Ice Tea Lemon pairs understated tea character with crisp citrus notes, appealing to customers who like a calm, elegant drink that still feels lively and refreshing.

products.name: Ice Tea Peach
products.shortDescription: Soft peach notes and a velvety tea finish.
products.description: Ice Tea Peach offers a mellow fruit profile with a refined tea body, giving the beverage an understated sophistication that feels ideal for warm afternoons.

products.name: Energy Drink Original
products.shortDescription: A focused energy drink with a clean, sharp finish.
products.description: Energy Drink Original brings a crisp profile to the category, pairing measured stimulation with a clean finish that feels purposeful and contemporary.

products.name: Energy Drink Citrus
products.shortDescription: Citrus-led energy with a polished edge.
products.description: Energy Drink Citrus combines bright notes with a more modern taste profile, making it an excellent choice for demanding days while still feeling refined and approachable.

products.name: Water Natural
products.shortDescription: Pure hydration with a minimalist profile.
products.description: Water Natural is built around clarity and simplicity, offering pure hydration that feels effortless and dependable for any part of the day.

products.name: Water Flavored
products.shortDescription: Gentle fruit notes in a clean hydration format.
products.description: Water Flavored brings a subtle fruit accent to a refreshing hydration experience, offering a calm and contemporary alternative without overcomplicating the moment.

products.name: Green Tea
products.shortDescription: Soft green tea character with a vegetal finish.
products.description: Green Tea presents a balanced herbal profile with a clear, polished finish, offering a refined beverage for those who appreciate thoughtful ingredients and calm flavor.

products.name: Black Tea
products.shortDescription: A deeper tea profile with a grounded finish.
products.description: Black Tea offers a richer profile and a more confident structure, giving the beverage a mature flavour presence that feels suitable for both morning and evening moments.

products.name: Apple Juice
products.shortDescription: A clean apple profile with natural fruit clarity.
products.description: Apple Juice is bright, polished and effortless, delivering a fruit-led drinking experience that feels gentle, familiar and premium in equal measure.

products.name: Pomegranate Juice
products.shortDescription: Bold fruit character with a smooth finish.
products.description: Pomegranate Juice presents a deeper fruit character and a polished finish, giving the experience a slightly more premium tone without losing clarity or approachability.
